items.title: Just a few hours left for Khris Middleton to sign an extension and avoid free agency. The most the Mavericks can offer him is a four year, $208,834,639 pact that runs through 2030, but Middleton may be wanting to see what he can get on the open market instead.
items.author: Mark Deeks
items.body_excerpt: Just a few hours left for Khris Middleton to sign an extension and avoid free agency. The most the Mavericks can offer him is a four year, $208,834,639 pact that runs through 2030, but Middleton may be wanting to see what he can get on the open market instead.

items.title: [Skolnick] I’ll just say this. I think there’s a lot of guys who will slip to the minimum. I think one guy for instance, I think you can just gurantee Khris Middleton is going to be here…. He is exactly the type of player the Heat add towards the end of their career
